description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a spacious, rectangular footprint and a large, open green lawn occupying most of the lot. The structure includes multiple rooms, visible through large windows and glass doors, and is complemented by a swimming pool set into the lawn. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with a modern, minimalist aesthetic and clean lines. There is a small garden area with shrubs along one edge, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the main facade. The roof is flat, enhancing the contemporary style, and the property is enclosed by low boundary walls. The interior appears to be divided into living, dining, and bedroom spaces, with visible furnishings and open-plan design.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a spacious green lawn, and a swimming pool. The exterior is white and minimalist, with symmetrical window arrangements and a small garden area.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with large windows, a covered entry area, and a wide expanse of green lawn leading to a swimming pool at the rear.
description_view_1: From this angle, the swimming pool and garden area are more prominent, and the arrangement of interior rooms and furnishings is visible through the windows.
description_view_2: This view shows the rear of the bungalow, emphasizing the large open lawn, the pool, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors along the back wall.
description_view_3: This side view reveals the depth of the property, the flat roof, and the layout of rooms along the side, with the pool and garden visible in the background.
